title: true craft smp
description: a fun mod pack for my private server featuring many good mods focusing on combat exploration PVP and building and magic has performance mods as well as shader support
body:
## True Craft SMP: Your Personal Minecraft Adventure

**Welcome to True Craft SMP,** the private Minecraft server of a close-knit community. Prepare for thrilling combat, exploration, PvP, building, and magic, all calibrated for fluid performance.

**Join Us:**

*   Combat, Exploration, PvP, Building, Magic
*   Close-Knit Community
*   Optimized Performance

## True Craft SMP: Your Own Minecraft Kingdom

**Discover True Craft SMP,** a private Minecraft server for an exclusive community. Enjoy combat, exploration, PvP, building, and magic with a friendly community.

## TrueCraft SMP: Private Minecraft Paradise!

**Welcome to TrueCraft SMP,** a private Minecraft server with wonderful players. Experience combat, exploration, building, and magic!

**Why Join?**

*   Friendly Community
*   Occasional Updates
*   Apply through Discord
I hope this is what you needed! Let me know if you need further adjustments.
